persona.name: Gregory Okonkwo
persona.background: Comfortable with formal processes and provides exactly the information requested. Reasonable and cooperative even when there's a problem to resolve.

user_goals: Check the current balance and available funds in his primary checking account
Find out the current mortgage interest rate for someone in his customer segment, since he is thinking about a home-equity loan
Move $15,000 from his savings into checking so the funds are ready if he moves forward on the home-equity plan
Review the last five checking transactions, where he will notice a wire he did not authorize
Report a $3,400 outgoing wire to 'NORTHGATE HOLDINGS' that he never set up
Place a temporary security freeze on the checking account so nothing else can leave it while the wire is investigated
Submit a home-equity loan application for $40,000 over 120 months on his stated income

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

tools.name: initiate_transfer
tools.description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds between two of the customer's own accounts. Requires verified identity. NOTE: this is a single transfer that happens once. For a repeating automatic schedule use setup_recurring_transfer instead — do not confuse the two.

tools.name: get_interest_rates
tools.description: Get current interest rates for account and product types. This is public rate information and does NOT require identity verification. Optionally scope by customer segment.

tools.name: submit_loan_application
tools.description: Submit a formal loan application for underwriting. Requires verified identity. This SUBMITS an application for review and credit decision; it does not approve or disburse a loan. Income is required for underwriting. Use get_interest_rates for indicative product rates before applying.

parameters.name: annual_income
parameters.description: Applicant's stated annual income in USD

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, typically in response to suspected fraud or a lost card. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account, which permanently closes the account. Prefer this over closure when the customer simply needs to stop activity while an issue is investigated.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

tools.name: close_account
tools.description: Permanently close an account and disburse any remaining balance. Requires verified identity AND explicit customer confirmation. This is IRREVERSIBLE and high-impact — do not call it for temporary holds (use freeze_account) or as a substitute for fraud reporting. The account must have a zero or positive balance to close.

parameters.name: disbursement_account_id
parameters.description: Account to send any remaining balance to

parameters.name: confirmation
parameters.description: Explicit customer confirmation that they want to permanently close

initial_message: Good afternoon. I have a few things to go over on my accounts today. I'd like to start by getting a clear picture of where my checking account stands, and then I have some questions about borrowing against the house.

expected_state_changes.goal: Move $15,000 from his savings into checking so the funds are ready if he moves forward on the home-equity plan
Move $15,000 from his savings into checking so the funds are ready if he moves forward on the home-equity plan
Report a $3,400 outgoing wire to 'NORTHGATE HOLDINGS' that he never set up
Place a temporary security freeze on the checking account so nothing else can leave it while the wire is investigated
Submit a home-equity loan application for $40,000 over 120 months on his stated income
